title: arthraxon hispidus subsp. ciliaris
intro: Arthraxon hispidus subsp. ciliaris, also known as Chinese star grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Chinese star grass include reducing swelling and pain in the joints, as well as aiding in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. Chinese star grass is often prepared as a tea or decoction, and may also be used in combination with other herbs in traditional herbal preparations.
